block_goal: Закрыть следующий приоритетный gap из `NEXT_STEPS.md`: стабилизировать Antarctica truth model через bounded completion contracts layer (`session`/`runtime`/`manifest`), явное моделирование core entities в `games/antarctica/game.manifest.json` и каноническую schema validation без возврата к manual legacy parsing или ad hoc contract drift.

expected_execution_time.notes: Основное время уйдёт на bounded contract freeze, extraction-backed entity modeling и negative validation coverage. Поллинг Оркестратора должен учитывать, что task `task-populate-antarctica-core-entities` может идти дольше остальных из-за extraction/verification loop.

method_selection_rationale: Это следующий приоритет из `NEXT_STEPS.md`, и он касается shared contracts + manifest validation boundary. До дальнейшего расширения player-web или новых runtime slices полезнее сначала стабилизировать договорённый contract surface и validation path, чтобы исключить semantic drift между `packages/contracts/*`, `games/antarctica/game.manifest.json` и `services/runtime-api`. Дополнительная mixed-method complexity здесь не нужна.

acceptance_model.plan_review: Optional: отдельный PM plan review не требуется, пока блок остаётся внутри уже принятых ADR-018/019/024 и не вводит новый reusable engine/schema platform.
acceptance_model.task_acceptance: Executor owns task-level acceptance through `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md`, `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` updates during freeze, and compact correction logs.
acceptance_model.block_acceptance: PM owns block acceptance after contract freeze is explicit, manifest schema validation is proven by checks, and PM can issue `CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md` plus `PM_DECISION_PACKET.md`.

architect_instructions_for_orchestrator: Материализуй task-packets только из этого плана и не переписывай требования своими словами.
Не диспатчь implement/conformance tasks, пока в block workspace не обновлён `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` после двух freeze-задач.
Перед dispatch последующих задач прогоняй `detect_contract_drift.py` по проектному workflow path; если он показывает drift, останавливайся и эскалируй к Architect.
Для polling cadence опирайся на `expected_execution_time` блока и `expected_duration` каждой задачи: extraction/validation tasks допускают более длинный idle window, чем чистый contract freeze.

После завершения всех задач запроси у PM `CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md` и `PM_DECISION_PACKET.md`; так как slice имеет `risk_class = R2`, после `status = accepted` обязан появиться `ARCHITECT_FINAL_ACCEPTANCE.json` перед полным закрытием блока.
global_rules: Использовать Context7, когда нужно подтвердить актуальные best practices для schema/versioning/contract validation; для этого блока ориентир — JSON Schema guidance: явный schema dialect (`$schema`), versioned contract surface и отделение schema concerns от instance data.
Сохранять ADR-018 truth model: исполнимая логика заканчивается в `games/antarctica/game.manifest.json`.
Сохранять ADR-019 ownership boundary: `runtime-api` остаётся owner загрузки игрового контента и player-facing projection; этот блок не возвращает direct reads из `player-web`.
Не вводить generic gameplay engine, selector system, reusable DSL или новый cross-game schema platform без подтверждённого повторного use case и новой architect escalation.
Для legacy Antarctica source использовать только scripts-based extraction и targeted CLI; whole-file manual prose reading `draft/Antarctica/GameFull.html` запрещён.
global_acceptance: `packages/contracts/session`, `packages/contracts/runtime` и `packages/contracts/manifest` покрывают bounded current consumer surface без скрытых ad hoc shapes.
`games/antarctica/game.manifest.json` содержит явные core entities, подтверждённые extraction-driven evidence path.
Canonical manifest validation rejects invalid shape and accepts the canonical Antarctica manifest.
`npm run verify:runtime-api`, `npm run verify:antarctica-extraction` и `npm run verify:canonical` подтверждают delivered boundary.
Docs/handoff не противоречат обновлённой truth-model и validation boundary.
global_invariants: Legacy HTML остаётся factual extraction source, но не source of truth.
Никакой новый ADR не появляется, если блок остаётся внутри существующих architecture decisions ADR-018/019/024.

risk_policy.R0: локальная docs/mechanical cleanup без изменения contract or validation behavior
risk_policy.R1: bounded truth-model extension внутри существующего manifest/runtime model без изменения reusable public contract ownership
risk_policy.R2: shared contract surface change, schema validation boundary change, reusable abstraction attempt, or ownership drift across packages/runtime

method_workflow: Freeze: зафиксировать bounded session/runtime/manifest contracts и свести их в `CONTRACT_INDEX.md`.
Implement: описать core Antarctica entities в canonical manifest, используя только scripts-based extraction path.
Conformance: включить schema validation и negative/positive checks against frozen contract surface.
Accept: PM подтверждает conformance, после чего Architect делает final acceptance, потому что это R2 block.

method_phases.description: Bounded contract freeze для `session`, `runtime`, `manifest` и explicit contract index.
Manifest truth-model sync with extraction-backed Antarctica core entities.
Canonical schema validation and proof that implementation matches the frozen contract.

method_controls: Никакая implementation task не стартует, пока freeze-phase contracts не сведены в `CONTRACT_INDEX.md`.
После freeze phase Orchestrator обязан убедиться, что `detect_contract_drift.py` не сигнализирует drift перед следующими dispatch steps.
PM не делает block acceptance, пока не существует `CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md` и не пройдены required checks.
Если `PM_DECISION_PACKET.status != accepted`, Architect final acceptance не создаётся.
method_freeze_rules: Freeze current bounded DTO/API surface before modeling new manifest entities.
Manifest schema validation must align with the frozen manifest contract instead of introducing a second competing contract truth.
Any breaking contract rename or ownership change requires architect escalation instead of silent implementation.
technology_rules: Предпочитать additive contract extension текущих package exports вместо breaking rename, если это не ухудшает ясность.
Держать canonical runtime validation в `services/runtime-api/src/modules/content/manifestValidation.ts` или рядом с ним; не разводить parallel validator truth в unrelated folders.
Если появляется schema file, он должен быть явно привязан к текущему manifest contract and versioning story.
Не добавлять новые third-party libraries, если текущий bounded validation path может покрыть задачу штатными средствами проекта.
Extraction tooling использовать как evidence generator, а не как источник новой reusable platform abstraction.
adr_requirements: Новый ADR не требуется, пока блок остаётся bounded implementation of existing ADR-018, ADR-019, and ADR-024.
Если schema validation внезапно требует нового reusable platform-wide rule engine или ownership shift, остановиться и эскалировать вместо тихого расширения блока.
Если меняется practical handoff about runtime-owned validation boundary, синхронизировать `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` и `NEXT_STEPS.md`.

slices.title: Antarctica truth model contracts and schema
slices.goal: Стабилизировать следующий приоритетный truth-model boundary: shared contracts, explicit Antarctica core entities и canonical schema validation для `game.manifest.json`.
forbidden_moves: Не читать `draft/Antarctica/GameFull.html` целиком вручную как prose source.
Не вводить generic gameplay engine, selector system, contract DSL или reusable schema platform.
Не менять ownership boundary из ADR-019 и не возвращать direct `games/*` reads в `player-web`.
Не расширять `packages/contracts/ai` или unrelated platform surfaces.
Не создавать второй конкурирующий source of truth для manifest shape вне frozen contracts + canonical validator path.
control_points: `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` explicitly names the frozen session/runtime/manifest contract surfaces before later tasks continue.
Antarctica entity modeling is backed by extraction commands, not manual legacy prose interpretation.
Schema validation is wired into the canonical runtime-owned validation path, not left as docs-only guidance.
Public/runtime contract evolution remains additive and auditable.
mandatory_tests: runtime-api contract tests for DTO and validation boundaries
negative validation tests for malformed manifest/action/content/design shapes
extraction verification proving script-based Antarctica evidence path
canonical verification across runtime-api and player-web consumers
acceptance_criteria: Bounded DTO coverage exists in `packages/contracts/session`, `packages/contracts/runtime`, and `packages/contracts/manifest` for current consumers.
`games/antarctica/game.manifest.json` includes explicit core entities aligned with extracted Antarctica source facts.
Canonical validation accepts the real Antarctica manifest and rejects invalid shapes.
Required verification commands pass and docs/handoff accurately describe the delivered truth-model boundary.

tasks.goal: Довести `packages/contracts/session` и `packages/contracts/runtime` до полного bounded набора DTO для session/action/result, который уже нужен текущим consumer-ам `runtime-api` и `player-web`.
inputs: Priority 1 and Priority 3 items for `packages/contracts/session` and `packages/contracts/runtime` from `NEXT_STEPS.md`.
Current player-facing DTO usage in `apps/player-web` and `services/runtime-api`.
implementation_notes: Keep the change additive and bounded to current session/action/result consumers; do not introduce `packages/contracts/ai` work in this block.
Use clear DTO names that match current runtime semantics instead of inventing a generic platform-wide abstraction.
Document the frozen contract surface in `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` so later tasks and PM conformance work can refer to one canonical contract index.
tests_to_write: Contract or integration coverage for session/action/result DTO serialization/deserialization where current runtime tests are missing.
Negative coverage for malformed action/result payloads if the current suite does not already prove rejection.
deliverables: Completed bounded DTO exports in `packages/contracts/session` and `packages/contracts/runtime`.
Consumer sync in `services/runtime-api` for the frozen DTO names/shapes.
Updated `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` with the session/runtime contract surface.
escalate_if: a required DTO change would break the existing `runtime-api` HTTP boundary instead of extending it safely
the block starts to require `packages/contracts/ai` or a new cross-game contract family
current consumers disagree on a fundamental session/action/result ownership boundary
artifact_expectations: Update `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md`, `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, and the task-specific correction log.
Update `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` with the frozen DTO surface before implementation moves to later tasks.

tasks.goal: Заполнить `packages/contracts/manifest` типами manifest bundle, action definitions, content metadata и design references, чтобы manifest boundary был явным и version-ready.
inputs: Priority 1 / Priority 3 / Priority 5 manifest-contract items from `NEXT_STEPS.md`.
Current Antarctica manifest shape and runtime content projection.
implementation_notes: Freeze the manifest contract as a bounded Antarctica-ready contract surface, not as a new generic gameplay DSL or reusable engine layer.
Keep design references explicit and typed so runtime-owned content projection stays auditable.
Update the same `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` rather than splitting contract truth across multiple temporary notes.
tests_to_write: Contract-level tests or type assertions that prove manifest bundle/action/content/design reference fields are accepted and projected as intended.
Negative validation coverage for missing or malformed manifest contract fields when not already covered.
deliverables: Runtime consumer sync for the frozen manifest contract surface.
Updated `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` covering manifest contract ownership and versioning expectations.
escalate_if: the contract work would require a new reusable gameplay engine, selector system, or capability DSL
a required manifest field cannot be represented additively inside the current ADR-018 truth model
typed design references require a new ownership boundary beyond ADR-019
artifact_expectations: Update `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md`, `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, and the task-specific correction log.
Ensure `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` clearly separates manifest contract fields from runtime instance data.

tasks.goal: Явно описать в `games/antarctica/game.manifest.json` основные сущности `Antarctica`, используя extraction scripts и targeted CLI вместо ручного whole-file reading legacy HTML.
inputs: Priority 1 truth-model item for explicit Antarctica entities in `game.manifest.json`.
Extraction rules and current legacy-structure reference from `draft/Antarctica/README.md`.
Current extraction scripts and the current bounded opening-flow manifest state.
implementation_notes: Use `npm run antarctica:extract-opening`, `npm run verify:antarctica-extraction`, and targeted `npm run antarctica:extract-step -- --line <lineIndex> --step <stepIndex>` when detailed evidence is needed.
Do not manually read `draft/Antarctica/GameFull.html` end-to-end as prose; treat it only as a factual extraction source through scripts.
Model only explicit Antarctica entities that are needed by the canonical truth model; do not introduce a generic engine-level abstraction.
tests_to_write: Evidence-driven manifest tests or fixtures proving the new core entities map to extracted Antarctica source facts.
Negative coverage for entity omissions or malformed references if the extraction/validation suite does not already fail on them.
deliverables: Updated `games/antarctica/game.manifest.json` with explicit core entity descriptions aligned to the current truth model.
Extraction evidence and/or verification updates that prove the entities come from script-based extraction, not manual prose reading.
Handoff/docs sync if the entity surface changes the practical truth-model explanation.
escalate_if: the next entity step would require manual whole-file interpretation of `GameFull.html`
the modeled entities imply a new reusable engine abstraction instead of bounded Antarctica data
extraction scripts do not expose enough targeted evidence to continue safely
artifact_expectations: Update `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md`, `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, and the task-specific correction log.
Reference the exact extraction commands used so PM can reproduce the evidence path.

tasks.goal: Ввести schema validation для `games/antarctica/game.manifest.json` и встроить её в канонический runtime validation/tooling path без ad hoc drift.
inputs: Frozen session/runtime/manifest contract surface from earlier tasks.
implementation_notes: Keep validation separate from instance data and prefer a stable versioned schema boundary; current Context7 guidance for JSON Schema planning is to declare the schema dialect explicitly via `$schema` and keep schema concerns distinct from validated instance documents.
Prefer additive validation aligned with the frozen manifest contract instead of a second independent schema truth source.
Do not introduce a new external validation platform or generic compiler tool unless the current bounded validator path is provably insufficient.
tests_to_write: Negative validation tests for missing required fields, malformed action definitions, and invalid content/design references.
Positive validation coverage for the canonical Antarctica manifest after entity modeling.
deliverables: Canonical manifest schema validation wired into `runtime-api` validation/tooling.
A test suite that proves both acceptance of the canonical manifest and rejection of invalid shapes.
Docs/handoff sync describing the practical validation boundary.
escalate_if: validation requires a new public endpoint family or a new reusable schema platform decision
the canonical manifest cannot be validated without contradicting the frozen contract surface
the work would require a new ADR for cross-module ownership change
artifact_expectations: Update `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md`, `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, and the task-specific correction log.
Leave `CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md` to PM, but provide enough facts and negative-case evidence for PM to write it.
